description: Coffee storefront, mid-run worker fills a pricing-related leaf with an obviously placeholder/inadequate fill (self-declared partial coverage, no competitive analysis). Tests whether Alignment writes alignment_unmet_intent and whether Gap Finding reacts with reopen. Fill targets a live leaf by intent-substring match so the scenario is robust to dynamic gap IDs.

events.author: worker
events.summary: Set prices for 3 SKUs (of a planned 12-SKU menu) at $18/bag flat across the board. Did not run any competitive survey, did not compute landed cost or margin floor, did not validate against the roaster-wholesale contract yet — these are placeholder values so we have *something* on the storefront; will revisit when pricing research lands. Flagging this as done for now because the storefront won't publish without price fields populated.
